CREATE TABLE test_atan (id INT PRIMARY KEY, x DOUBLE, y DOUBLE);
SELECT id, atan(x, y) AS atan_value FROM test_atan;
SELECT id, atan(x, y) AS atan_value FROM test_atan WHERE x > 0 AND y > 0;
SELECT id, atan(x, y) AS atan_value FROM test_atan WHERE y = 0;
SELECT id, atan(x, y) AS atan_value FROM test_atan WHERE x < 0 AND y < 0;
SELECT id, atan(x, y) AS atan_value FROM test_atan WHERE x != 0 AND y != 0 ORDER BY atan_value DESC;
SELECT t.id, atan(t.x, t.y) AS atan_value FROM test_atan t JOIN (SELECT 1 AS dummy) d ON t.id = d.dummy;
SELECT id, atan(x + 2, y - 3) AS atan_value FROM test_atan;
SELECT id, atan(x / NULLIF(y, 0), y) AS atan_value FROM test_atan;
SELECT id, atan(x, y) + PI() AS atan_plus_pi FROM test_atan;
SELECT id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_atan WHERE atan(x, y) > 0) AS count_positive_atan FROM test_atan;
SELECT a.id, atan(a.x, a.y) AS atan_value, b.some_column FROM test_atan a JOIN (SELECT 1 as some_column) b ON a.id = b.some_column;
